visionAnalysis.caption: The image shows two large circular features and two smaller irregular shapes. The larger circles appear to be solid, but the smaller shapes suggest possible contamination or spurious material. There is no evidence of structural defects such as cracks, opens, or shorts, but the presence of irregular shapes indicates contamination or spurious material.
